name: United Food Holdings Limited
summary: United Food Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the purchase and sale of food products in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It also manufactures and sells additives, such as L-ascorbyl palmitate or antioxidant; and animal feed and traditional medicine from traditional Chinese herbs. In addition, the company trades in agricultural products; and provides logistics services. United Food Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
